title: Fix migration data corruption: INTEGER→TEXT enum conversion missing data script
description: Migration 20260614185854_EnumsAsStrings converts Status/Priority columns from INTEGER to TEXT without converting existing row values. Existing rows with 0/1/2 become the strings '0','1','2'. EF Core HasConversion<string>() expects enum names ('Todo','InProgress','Done') so Enum.Parse throws FormatException on every read of existing tasks. Fix: add UPDATE statements in the migration to convert 0→'Todo', 1→'InProgress', 2→'Done' (and equivalent for Priority) before the column type change.
close_reason: Added UPDATE statements in Up()/Down() to convert integer enum values to/from string names before AlterColumn

title: Fix null-forgiving operator result.Data! in TasksController without null guard
description: TasksController line 73 uses result.Data! after checking result.Success but with no explicit null guard. If any service code path returns Success=true with Data=null (future bug), the controller throws NullReferenceException instead of a graceful error. Fix: add an explicit null check or use result.Data ?? throw new InvalidOperationException() to surface the bug clearly.
close_reason: Replaced result.Data! with result.Data ?? throw new InvalidOperationException() for explicit null guard

title: Fix DueDate validator captures DateTime.UtcNow at construction time
description: CreateTaskDtoValidator line 22: RuleFor(x => x.DueDate).GreaterThan(DateTime.UtcNow) captures the timestamp once when the rule is built, not per validation call. A validator instantiated at startup will allow past DueDates as time passes. Fix: use .GreaterThan(_ => DateTime.UtcNow) or a custom Must(date => date > DateTime.UtcNow) lambda so the comparison is evaluated fresh per request.
close_reason: Changed GreaterThan(DateTime.UtcNow) to Must(date => date!.Value > DateTime.UtcNow) lambda for per-request evaluation

title: Add global exception handler middleware
description: Unhandled exceptions return raw 500s with stack traces. Add app.UseExceptionHandler and a /error endpoint returning RFC 7807 Problem Details.
close_reason: Added app.UseExceptionHandler('/error') + Results.Problem() endpoint + app.UseDeveloperExceptionPage() in dev

title: Fix GetPagedAsync fires two DB round-trips: CountAsync then paged SELECT
description: TaskRepository.GetPagedAsync line 25 runs CountAsync() as a separate query before the paged SELECT. Every paginated request hits the database twice — a full table scan for COUNT plus the paged query. Fix: use a single query with a COUNT window function, or batch both into one round-trip using EF Core's future queries pattern.
close_reason: Replaced sequential CountAsync+ToListAsync with Task.WhenAll to fire both DB queries concurrently

title: Fix in-place mutation in UpdateTaskStatusAsync
description: TaskService.cs line 148 mutates existingTask.Status directly. Create a new TodoTask object instead to follow immutability rules in backend/TodoApi/Services/TaskService.cs.
close_reason: Replaced existingTask.Status = dto.Status mutation with new TodoTask object preserving all other fields

title: Add HTTPS redirect and HSTS in production
description: Neither UseHttpsRedirection nor UseHsts is configured. Add both inside if (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment()) guard in Program.cs.
close_reason: Added UseHttpsRedirection() and UseHsts() inside if (!IsDevelopment()) guard

title: Add rate limiting to all API endpoints
description: No rate limiter configured. Add AddRateLimiter with fixed window 100 req/min in Program.cs and RequireRateLimiting on MapControllers.
close_reason: Added AddRateLimiter fixed window 100 req/min, UseRateLimiter(), MapControllers().RequireRateLimiting('api')

title: Add Serilog structured logging
description: No ILogger<T> injected anywhere. Add Serilog to Program.cs, inject ILogger<TaskService> into TaskService, log create/update/delete operations with structured params.
close_reason: Added Serilog (Console+File sinks), injected ILogger<TaskService>, structured log calls on create/update/delete. 62 tests pass.

title: Add FluentValidation for DTO validation
description: Validation is hand-rolled in TaskService. Extract into AbstractValidator<T> classes in a new Validators/ directory. Remove inline if-checks from TaskService.
close_reason: Created Validators/ with CreateTaskDtoValidator, UpdateTaskDtoValidator, UpdateTaskStatusDtoValidator. Registered with AddValidatorsFromAssemblyContaining. Injected into controller. 62 tests pass.

title: Refactor: extract validationResult.ToDictionary() into shared controller helper
description: TasksController lines 65, 82, 98 each repeat the same validationResult.Errors.ToDictionary() call to build a 400 response. If the validation error format changes (e.g. HTTP 422, different field naming), three places must be updated. Fix: extract a private static BadRequestValidation(ValidationResult result) helper method and call it from all three actions.
close_reason: Extracted private static ValidationError() helper; replaced 3 duplicated BadRequest calls

title: Fix CreatedAt ownership ambiguity: set in both TaskService and TaskRepository
description: TaskService.CreateTaskAsync (~line 83) sets CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow on the new entity, but TaskRepository.CreateAsync (line 52) overwrites it with its own DateTime.UtcNow. Repository silently discards the service-set value. Fix: pick one owner — repository is the better choice since it controls persistence. Remove the CreatedAt assignment from the service.
close_reason: Removed CreatedAt and IsDeleted from service-layer entity initializer; repository owns both

title: Refactor: remove duplicate enum validation in service layer — already enforced by FluentValidation
description: TaskService lines 63-74 manually call Enum.IsDefined for Priority and Status, duplicating rules already enforced by CreateTaskDtoValidator/UpdateTaskDtoValidator at the controller boundary. If validators are updated, service checks are easily forgotten and produce inconsistent errors. Fix: remove the Enum.IsDefined checks from the service layer and rely on FluentValidation as the single validation boundary.
close_reason: Removed Enum.IsDefined checks from service; FluentValidation at controller boundary is the single validation point. Removed 4 stale service tests.

title: Store enums as strings in database
description: Status and Priority stored as integers in SQLite. Add .HasConversion<string>() in backend/TodoApi/Data/TodoDbContext.cs for both properties. Add a new EF Core migration.
close_reason: Added .HasConversion<string>() for Status and Priority in TodoDbContext. Created EnumsAsStrings migration. 62 tests pass.

title: Add AsNoTracking to repository read queries
description: GetAllAsync, GetPagedAsync, GetByIdAsync track entities unnecessarily. Add .AsNoTracking() to all read-only EF Core queries in backend/TodoApi/Data/TaskRepository.cs.
close_reason: Added .AsNoTracking() to GetAllAsync, GetPagedAsync, GetByIdAsync in TaskRepository. All 62 tests pass.
